title: Private Boat Hire in Marbella: 2026 Guide and Prices
html:
With its gleaming marina, the Puerto Banús, and year-round sunshine, private boat hire in Marbella offers the most exclusive way to explore the Costa del Sol. Starting at around €500 for a half-day on a motor yacht, you can access hidden coves and glamorous bays. BoatHire24 connects you with verified owners for a seamless booking experience.

How much does it cost to rent a private boat in Marbella?

Prices typically range from €400 for a small motorboat half-day to €3,000 for a crewed luxury yacht full-day. The final price depends on the boat size, season, and duration. For example, a 40-foot motor yacht half-day in June may cost around €800, while a full-day charter on a Sunseeker Predator can exceed €2,500.

  • Shared tour: from €90 per person for a 4-hour trip
  • Small motorboat (6-8 guests) half-day: from €400
  • Catamaran (10-14 guests) full-day: from €1,200
  • Crewed luxury yacht (10-20 guests) full-day: from €2,000

The best way to compare options is to browse the day charters in Marbella on BoatHire24, which include photos, reviews, and real-time availability.

Where to set off in Marbella

Most private boat hires depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic marina lined with designer boutiques and restaurants. Other departure points include the Marbella Marina (Puerto Deportivo de Marbella), Cabopino Port, and for larger charters, the port of Estepona to the west. Heading south, you can anchor at the sandy cove of Playa de Alcazaba or the exclusive island-like spot of Isla de Alborán, a marine reserve about 30 nautical miles offshore. Many skippers suggest a trip to the scenic coast of Benahavís or a sunset cruise past the Golden Mile.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor yacht (20-50 ft), best for small groups wanting speed and style; up to 10 guests; from €500 half-day.
  2. Catamaran (38-50 ft), ideal for stable cruising with families; up to 14 guests; from €900 half-day.
  3. Luxury superyacht (70-120 ft), for high-end experiences with crew; up to 20 guests; from €3,000 full-day.
  4. RIB or open sports boat (25-35 ft), perfect for watersports and agile exploration; up to 8 guests; from €300 half-day.

For a detailed look at a popular model, visit the Prestige 500 charter page to see its layout, inclusions, and skipper notes.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

No, for most private charters you do not need a licence because a professional skipper is included. In Spain, you need a licence to operate any powered vessel over 6 metres or with an engine over 15hp, but all BoatHire24 listings in Marbella are supplied with a certified skipper unless you select the bareboat option (which requires the Spanish navigation licence or international equivalent). The operator confirms the exact requirements before booking.

Local tip: In July and August, book at least two weeks in advance. The prevailing Poniente wind blows from the west, making the sea calmest in the mornings.

At a glance

  • Price band: €90 (shared) to €3,000+ (crewed yacht)
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Trip length: 4 hours half-day, 8 hours full-day
  • Capacity: 8 to 20 guests depending on boat
  • Currency: EUR (local ATMs accept Visa/Mastercard)

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I charter a boat for a day in Marbella without a licence?

Yes, any private charter with a skipper requires no licence from you.

What is the best time of year for a boat trip in Marbella?

The best months are May through October, with July and August offering the warmest weather and calmest seas.

How far in advance should I book private boat hire in Marbella?

For summer dates, booking two weeks ahead is recommended; for off-peak, five days is usually enough.

Are meals and drinks included in the price?

Most crewed charters include a standard menu and soft drinks; check the listing for full details.

To summarise, private boat hire in Marbella in 2026 gives you access to the finest parts of the Costa del Sol with complete flexibility. Whether you want to host a sunset party or explore the coast in comfort, the BoatHire24 marketplace offers verified listings direct from owners. Boat owners can also list their own boat and start earning.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
